title: DLSA Bhojpur Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Para Legal Officer Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) Bhojpur has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 40 Para Legal Volunteers Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the DLSA Bhojpur Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of applciation....
